THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT LUSCUTOFF, LENDORMY & ASSOCIATES RECOVER FROM APPELLANT WONG, GEORGE AKA GEORGE K. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-07-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Wednesday, Jan. 7, 2015 in Department 525:
Luscutoff, Lendormy & Associates, Respondent/Plaintiff appears by Jean-Yves Lendormy - Managing Attorney with witness/attorney Florence Phillips.
George Wong, Appellant/Defendantappears in Propria Persona.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All Parties and witness are sworn and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tempore Fleming.

Florence Phillips testifies on behalf of Luscutoff, Lendormy & Associates. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit 1 - letter of contract
Exhibit 2 - list of itemized bills and receipts
Exhibit 3 - global settlement offer letter

George Wong testifies on his own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit 1 - oct.30, 2013 letter from plaintiff's attorney Florence

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly evidence retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tempore: James Fleming; Clerk J. Kong; Not Reported.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-04-2014 Continued To Jan-07-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-16-2014 Judgment Entered
